prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约10997名、11380名、10699名、10041名、10979名，整体在10000–11400名区间波动，近5年均值约10819名；2025 年基准位次约10979名，较2024年有所后移，显示竞争略有回升；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年14人、2022年15人、2023年14人、2024年12人、2025年14 人；2026年计划仍为14人，与2025年持平，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北农林科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升， 2021年第76名→2022年第74名→2023年第74名→2024年第73名→2025年第71名→2026年第69名，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力和声誉增强；2022年该校曾出现教师 学术不端负面事件，但近年声誉文件未再收录该校负面信号；抖音热度总排名第75位，评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、植物保护、畜牧学、草学获评A-，共4个A-学科，农林特色鲜明；招生专业中生物科学类、食品营养与健康、动物医学等与优势学科群有 较强关联，对相关方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关农林类专业社会热度整体平稳；北京市考生总数持续增长，2021年42,037人→2025年65,434人→2026年84,9 00人，2026年较2025年增幅约29.7%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧；该校位于陕西省咸 阳市，属西部农林类院校，在北京考生中地域偏好一般；本地招生占比极小（2025年北京计划仅14人，占该校全国总招生比例极低），地域因素对报考热度影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在10000–11400名区间波动、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、北京考生总数大幅增加约29.7%以及学校排名持续提升等多重因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年有所 加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低录取位次约11179名，区间10679–11679名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 生物科学类（含生物科学、生物技术、生物工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 食品营养与健康（卓越班）
- 动物医学（五年制）
- 机械类（含机械设计制造及其自动化、机械电子工程、车辆工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会学类（含社会学、社会工作）
- 金融学
- 经济学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10679–11679名内，建议以二档专业（食品营养与健康、动物医学、机械类）为主攻方向，一档生物科学类可冲刺，三档社会学类、金融学、经济学作为保底；位 次明显优于区间下限（如10500名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（如11500名以外）建议以三档专业为主稳妥报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 10997, 11380, 10699, 10041, and 10979 respectively, fluctuating within the range of 10000–11400, with a 5-year average of about 10819; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10979, slightly lower than 2024, indicating a slight increase in competition; the enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Beijing was 14 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 14 in 2025; the plan for 2026 remains 14, unchanged from 2025, with stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest A&F University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 76th in 2021 → 74th in 2022 → 74th in 2023 → 73rd in 2024 → 71st in 2025 → 69th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and reputation; in 2022, there was a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher, but recent reputation documents no longer include negative signals about the university; its overall ranking on Douyin (TikTok) is 75th, with an evaluation of 'average', indicating moderate to low exposure on short video platforms and no clear signs of increased application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grass Science were rated A-, totaling 4 A- disciplines, highlighting distinctive agricultural and forestry features; among the enrollment majors, Biological Sciences, Food Nutrition and Health, and Veterinary Medicine are strongly related to the advantageous discipline clusters, attracting some candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of related agriculture and forestry majors is stable; the total number of candidates in Beijing has been continuously increasing: 42,037 in 2021 → 65,434 in 2025 → 84,900 in 2026, with an increase of about 29.7% from 2025 to 2026, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; the university is located in Xianyang City, Shaanxi Province, a western agriculture and forestry institution, with generally average geographical preference among Beijing candidates; the local enrollment proportion is very small (the 2025 Beijing plan is only 14, accounting for a very low proportion of the university's total national enrollment), so geographical factors have limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as historical rankings fluctuating within the 10000–11400 range, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a significant increase of about 29.7% in the number of Beijing candidates, and the university's continuously improving ranking, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify compared to 2025, with a slight backward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum admission ranking is about 11179, with a range of 10679–11679.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Science, Biotechnology, Bioengineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Food Nutrition and Health (Excellent Class)
- Veterinary Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Mechanicals (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechatronic Engineering, Vehicle Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Sociology (including Sociology, Social Work)
- Finance
- Economics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10679–11679, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Nutrition and Health, Veterinary Medicine, Mechanicals) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Biological Sciences as a reach, and Tier 3 Sociology, Finance, and Economics as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10500), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 11500), it is advisable to primarily choose Tier 3 majors for a stable application.
